prompt: Open Safari Settings (Cmd+,) > Privacy > Manage Website Data. Search for 'example.com', select that entry, and click Remove. Close the sheet with Done. Or cerebellum 'safari clear_cookies example.com ~/Desktop/kinbench/107-cookies-confirm.txt' which drives the UI and writes the confirm file. Then write 'example.com data removed' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/107-cookies-confirm.txt (the cookie store is TCC-protected; we trust the confirm file).
